Id1.text: Pangasinense people are the ethnic group of the Philippines.

Id2.text: The ethnic group in the Philippines is called the Pangasinense people.

Id3.text: The ethnic group of the Philippines is Pangasinense.

Id4.text: The Pangasinense people are an ethnic group native to the Philippines.
